channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Organized Repatriation of Filipinos from Dubai Amid Middle East Crisis
item.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East crisis, a hotel ballroom in Dubai has been converted into a repatriation hub for overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) and their dependents. Authorities, led by Labor Attaché J...

item.title: Dervla McTiernan on her career shift, health scare, and success as a crime novelist
item.description: Bestselling crime author Dervla McTiernan, now based in Perth, reflects on the unexpected personal and professional turning points that shaped her writing career. Originally from Galway, Ireland, McTi...

item.title: Key storylines as Montreal Canadiens meet Buffalo Sabres in a matchup driven by young talent
item.description: The upcoming matchup between the Montreal Canadiens and the Buffalo Sabres highlights two NHL teams built around emerging young talent and offensive creativity. Both clubs are in similar stages of dev...

item.title: Japan and Philippines Begin Negotiations on Destroyer Transfers Amid Maritime Security Concerns
item.description: Japan and the Philippines have agreed to start working-level discussions regarding the potential export of Japanese destroyers to the Philippine Navy. This decision comes as both countries express sha...

item.title: Court Directs FIR Against Cruise Operator Following Jabalpur Boat Accident
item.description: In a recent development regarding the unfortunate boat accident in Jabalpur, the local court has directed the registration of an FIR against the cruise operator responsible for the incident. This deci...

item.title: Sara Duterte stresses privacy of family amid impeachment allegations
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte, currently in The Hague, Netherlands, expressed that it is unfair to involve her family members in her impeachment proceedings. She highlighted that her relatives are priva...

item.title: Princess of Wales to resume official overseas duties with early childhood visit to Italy
item.description: The Princess of Wales is set to resume official overseas engagements with a two-day visit to Italy on 13 and 14 May, marking her first such trip in over three years. The visit, which will take place i...

item.title: ASX opens higher on ceasefire news; DigiCo benefits from US property sale
item.description: The Australian sharemarket opened higher on Wednesday, buoyed by optimism around a potential ceasefire between the US and Iran. The S&P/ASX 200 gained 50.9 points, or 0.6 per cent, reaching 8731.40 by...

item.title: Three Indians Injured in UAE Drone Attack Amid Rising Strait of Hormuz Tensions
item.description: On Monday, three Indian nationals sustained injuries in a fire caused by a drone strike at an industrial area in Fujairah, United Arab Emirates, amid escalating tensions in West Asia. Prime Minister N...

item.title: Health Minister Not Called to Testify on E-Prescribing Program Despite Concerns Over $200M Funding
item.description: On May 5, 2026, the House of Commons health committee faced controversy over the federal e-prescribing program PrescribeIT, which has failed to achieve national adoption. Bloc Québécois MP Maxime Blan...

item.title: Understanding the Filipino Word ‘Oragon’ and Its Cultural Meaning
item.description: The ABS-CBN Lifestyle feature for May 6, 2026 highlights the word “oragon” as its Word of the Day. “Oragon” is a well-known term in the Bicol region of the Philippines, often used to describe a person...

item.title: IUML’s victory in 22 seats strengthens UDF’s win in Kerala Assembly elections
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, the United Democratic Front (UDF) achieved a resounding victory, significantly aided by the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML). IUML secured 22 out of the 27 seat...

item.title: Fatal Pretoria crash highlights ongoing illegal street racing problem on public roads
item.description: A fatal crash in Gezina, Pretoria, has drawn attention to the persistent problem of illegal street racing in the area, particularly along Steve Biko Road. The incident, which occurred on Sunday night,...

item.title: Kilifi Family Mourns 7-Year-Old After Tragic Abduction and Murder
item.description: In Kilifi County, the family of seven-year-old Bernadette Keziah is grieving deeply after she was allegedly abducted and later found dead. Bernadette, a pupil at Little Angels school, went missing on ...

item.title: Altara raises $7M to streamline scientific data integration in physical sciences
item.description: San Francisco-based startup Altara has raised $7 million in seed funding to tackle the challenge of fragmented data in the physical sciences. Companies developing batteries, semiconductors, and medica...

item.title: Kakamega Patients Raise Concerns Over Psychological Impact of Noisy Mortuary Trolleys
item.description: Residents and patients at Kakamega County Referral Hospital have raised serious concerns about the mortuary trolleys used within the facility, saying the equipment is causing fear and emotional distre...

item.title: Labour Department Attributes R300 Million Accounting Errors to Treasury System Upgrade
item.description: The South African Labour Minister, Nomakhosazana Meth, has stated that unaccounted expenditure of over R300 million in her department resulted from system issues linked to the National Treasury, rathe...

item.title: Retired Major General Denies Knowledge of Alleged Coup Plot Against Tinubu, Clarifies N2 Million Transfer
item.description: Retired Nigerian Army Major General Mohammed Ibrahim Gana don clear say e no get any hand for alleged coup wey dem dey talk say dem wan do against President Bola Tinubu. During interrogation by multi-...

item.title: Golden Knights seek improvement while Ducks look to capitalize after uneven Game 1
item.description: Despite securing a 3-1 victory in Game 1 of their second-round NHL playoff series, the Vegas Golden Knights were far from satisfied with their performance against the Anaheim Ducks. Vegas was outplaye...

item.title: Labour Ministers Consider Strategy to Enable Andy Burnham's Return for Leadership Contingency
item.description: Following disappointing local election forecasts, some ministers are reportedly discussing a strategy to allow Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Greater Manchester, to return to Westminster as a potential su...
